translations.### [重灌筆記1]-Laravel Homestead + phpMyAdm: ### [Reinstallation Note 1] - Laravel Homestead + phpMyAdmin Environment Setup
translations.### 安裝&啟動 Homestead Virtual Machine\n\n: ### Installing & Starting the Homestead Virtual Machine
translations.#### sites 是設定本機虛擬網域與目錄映射，我們還需要修改本地 Host: #### sites sets up local virtual domains and directory mappings. We also need to modify the local Hosts file to add domain-to-virtual machine mappings:
translations.#### 再來我們要將專案設定本機器存取測試網域：\n\n: #### Next, we need to configure the project to access the test domain on the local machine:
translations.#### 檢查 phpMyAdmin 是否正確連線\n\n: #### Check if phpMyAdmin is Connected Correctly
translations.***⚠️請注意*** *，不要直接複製使用以上範例，因為隨著 Composer: ***⚠️Please note*** *do not directly copy and use the above example, as the hash check code changes with Composer version updates.*
translations.***⚠️請注意*** *，如果沒加 `--provision` 則設定檔不會更: ***⚠️Please note*** *that if you don't add `--provision`, the configuration file won't update, and visiting the URL will show a `no input file specified` error.*
translations.**將** **phpMyAdmin 資料夾移動到 ~/Homestead 資料: **Move the phpMyAdmin folder into the ~/Homestead directory:**
translations.**打開複製出來的 Hosts 檔案，增加 sites 紀錄：**\n\n: **Open the copied Hosts file and add site entries:**
translations.*VirtualBox 安裝時會要求要重新開機還有要到「設定」-&gt;「安全性: *VirtualBox installation requires a reboot and you need to go to "Settings" -> "Security & Privacy" -> "Allow VirtualBox" to enable all services.*
translations.*homestead 預設 mysql 帳號密碼 `homestead` / `: *The default Homestead MySQL username and password are `homestead` / `secret`.*
translations.*phpMyAdmin 是一個以PHP為基礎，以Web-Base方式架構在網站主: *phpMyAdmin is a PHP-based, web-based MySQL database management tool hosted on a web server, allowing administrators to manage MySQL databases via a web interface. This interface provides an easier way to input complex SQL queries and is especially convenient for importing and exporting large amounts of data. — [Wiki](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/PhpMyAdmin){:target="_blank"}*
translations.*網域名稱可隨意自訂，反正只有自己本機可以 Access。*\n\n: *The domain name can be customized freely since only your local machine can access it.*
translations.- [Vagrant](https://www.vagrantup.com/do:
- [Vagrant](https://www.vagrantup.com/downloads){:target="_blank"}: Virtual environment configuration tool

- [VirtualBox](https://www.virtualbox.org/wiki/Downloads){:target="_blank"}: Free virtualization software. If you have purchased [Parallels](https://www.parallels.com/products/desktop/){:target="_blank"}, you can use Parallels directly (but you need to install the [plug-in](https://github.com/Parallels/vagrant-parallels){:target="_blank"}).
translations.- `IP`: The default is `192.168.10.10`,:
- `IP`: The default is `192.168.10.10`, which can be changed or left as is.

- `provider`: The default is `virtualbox`. Change this only if you use Parallels.

- Add `folders:`

- map: ~/Homestead/phpMyAdmin  
  to: /home/vagrant/phpMyAdmin

- Add `sites:`

- map: phpMyAdmin.test  
  to: /home/vagrant/phpMyAdmin
translations.> ***⚠️Please note*** *do not directly c: > ***⚠️Please note*** *do not directly copy and use the above example, as the hash check code changes with Composer version updates.*
translations.> ***⚠️Please note*** *that if you don't: > ***⚠️Please note*** *that if you don't add `--provision`, the configuration file won't update, and visiting the URL will show a `no input file specified` error.*
translations.> *The default Homestead MySQL username: > *The default Homestead MySQL username and password are `homestead` / `secret`.*
translations.> *The domain name can be customized fre: > *The domain name can be freely customized since only your local machine can access it.*
translations.> *VirtualBox installation requires a re: > *VirtualBox installation requires a reboot, and you need to go to "Settings" -> "Security & Privacy" -> "Allow VirtualBox" to enable all services.*
translations.> *phpMyAdmin is a PHP-based, web-based: > *phpMyAdmin is a PHP-based, web-based MySQL database management tool hosted on a web server, allowing administrators to manage MySQL databases via a web interface. This interface provides an easier way to input complex SQL queries and is especially convenient for importing and exporting large amounts of data. — [Wiki](https://zh.wikipedia.org/wiki/PhpMyAdmin){:target="_blank"}*
translations.> Recently, I reset my Mac and documente: > Recently, I reset my Mac and documented the steps to restore the Laravel development environment.
translations.[VirtualBox](https://www.virtualbox.org/: [VirtualBox](https://www.virtualbox.org/wiki/Downloads){:target="_blank"}: Free virtualization software. If you have purchased [Parallels](https://www.parallels.com/products/desktop/){:target="_blank"}, you can use Parallels directly (but you need to install the [plug-in](https://github.com/Parallels/vagrant-parallels){:target="_blank"}).
translations.`IP` : 預設是 `192.168.10.10` 可改可不\n: `IP`: The default is `192.168.10.10`, which can be changed or left as is.
translations.```bash\ngit clone https://github.com/la:
```bash
git clone https://github.com/laravel/homestead.git ~/Homestead
cd ~/Homestead
git checkout release
bash init.sh
```
translations.```bash\nphp -r \"copy('https://getcompo:
```bash
php -r "copy('https://getcomposer.org/installer', 'composer-setup.php');"
php -r "if (hash_file('sha384', 'composer-setup.php') === '756890a4488ce9024fc62c56153228907f1545c228516cbf63f885e036d37e9a59d27d63f46af1d4d07ee0f76181c7d3') { echo 'Installer verified'; } else { echo 'Installer corrupt'; unlink('composer-setup.php'); } echo PHP_EOL;"
php composer-setup.php --install-dir=/usr/local/bin --filename=composer
php -r "unlink('composer-setup.php');"
```
translations.```yaml\n---\nip: \"192.168.10.10\"\nmem:
```yaml
---
ip: "192.168.10.10"
memory: 2048
cpus: 2
provider: virtualbox

authorize: ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub

keys:
    - ~/.ssh/id_rsa

folders:
    - map: ~/Projects/Web
      to: /home/vagrant/code
    - map: ~/Homestead/phpMyAdmin
      to: /home/vagrant/phpMyAdmin

sites:
    - map: phpMyAdmin.test
      to: /home/vagrant/phpMyAdmin

databases:
    - homestead

features:
    - mysql: false
    - mariadb: false
    - postgresql: false
    - ohmyzsh: false
    - webdriver: false

#services:
#    - enabled:
#        - "postgresql@12-main"
#    - disabled:
#        - "postgresql@11-main"

# ports:
#     - send: 50000
#       to: 5000
#     - send: 7777
#       to: 777
#       protocol: udp
```
translations.`provider` ：預設是 `virtualbox` ，如果用 Parall: `provider`: The default is `virtualbox`. Change this only if you use Parallels.
translations.vagrant ssh 進 VM，然後 cd 到 code 目錄：\n\n: vagrant ssh into the VM, then cd to the code directory:
translations.下 laravel new 專案名稱，建立 Laravel 專案：(以 blog: Run `laravel new project_name` to create a Laravel project (using blog as an example):
translations.下載、安裝完這兩個軟體後，繼續下一步設定。\n\n: After downloading and installing these two software, proceed to the next setup step.
translations.並依序在 terminal 輸入指令。\n\n: Then enter the commands in the terminal one by one.
translations.主要是新增修改這三項設定：\n\n: Mainly add or modify these three settings:
translations.使用 Finder -&gt; Go -&gt; `/etc/hosts` ，找: Use Finder -> Go -> `/etc/hosts` to locate the `hosts` file; copy it to the desktop (since it cannot be edited directly)
translations.修改好之後儲存，然後再剪下貼回 `/etc/hosts` ，覆蓋掉即可。\n\n: After editing, save the file, then cut and paste it back into `/etc/hosts` to overwrite it.
translations.到 [phpMyAdmin](https://www.phpmyadmin.ne: Go to the [phpMyAdmin](https://www.phpmyadmin.net/){:target="_blank"} official website and download the latest version.
translations.前往 [http://phpmyadmin.test/](http://phpm: Go to [http://phpmyadmin.test/](http://phpmyadmin.test/index.php){:target="_blank"} to check if it opens correctly.
translations.回頭打開編輯 `~/Homestead/Homestead.yaml` 設定檔。: Now, open and edit the `~/Homestead/Homestead.yaml` configuration file.
translations.在 `phpMyAdmin` 資料夾中找到 `config.sample.inc: In the `phpMyAdmin` folder, find `config.sample.inc.php`, rename it to `config.inc.php`, and open it with an editor. Modify it with the following settings:
translations.在瀏覽器輸入 <http://myblog.test>{:target=\"_b: Enter <http://myblog.test>{:target="_blank"} in the browser to test if it is correctly set up and running:
translations.如果你有已存在的專案，到這一步已經可以從瀏覽器在本地運行了，如果沒有，這邊補充一: If you already have an existing project, at this point you can run it locally from the browser. If not, here is how to create a new Laravel project.
translations.如果已經有 Laravel 專案也可以一併在此新增，例如我專案都放在 `~/Pr: If you already have a Laravel project, you can add it here as well. For example, I keep my projects under `~/Projects/Web`, so I added the directory mapping accordingly.
translations.如果沒有出現特別的錯誤即表示啟動成功，可以下：\n\n: If no specific errors appear, it means the startup was successful. You can enter:
translations.從 0 到 1 建置 Laravel 開發環境並搭配 phpMyAdmin GU: From Zero to One: Setting Up a Laravel Development Environment with phpMyAdmin GUI for MySQL Database Management
translations.成功！我們遇到要操作資料庫的地方，直接進來這邊修改即可。\n\n: Success! Whenever we need to work with the database, we can directly come here to make changes.
translations.最近把 Mac Reset 一遍，紀錄一下重新還原 Laravel 開發環境的步: Recently, I reset my Mac and documented the steps to restore the Laravel development environment.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or suggestions, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.用編輯器打開 `~/Homestead/Homestead.yaml` 設定檔。: Open the `~/Homestead/Homestead.yaml` configuration file with an editor.
translations.第一次啟動，需要下載 Homestead 環境包，需要較長的時間。\n\n: The first time you start, it requires downloading the Homestead environment package, which takes a longer time.
translations.複製下載區段的指令，將 `php composer-setup.php` 替換為: Copy the commands in the download section and replace `php composer-setup.php` with:
translations.記得 hosts 也要加上對應紀錄：\n\n: Remember to add the corresponding entries to the hosts file as well:
translations.輸入 `composer -V` 確認版本＆安裝成功！\n\n: Enter `composer -V` to check the version and confirm successful installation!
translations.雖然已經有用 Homestead 可以不需要另外裝 Composer，但考慮到有: Although Homestead includes Composer, since some PHP projects may not use Laravel, it is still necessary to install Composer on the local machine.
